svg.title: UML Sequence Diagram – Student Exam Form Submission Flow
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing the interaction between Student, StudentController, ExamService, NotificationService, and ExamCellStaff for exam form submission and result publishing.
svg.text: UML Sequence Diagram — Exam Form Submission & Result Publishing
ExamCellStaff uploads marks and publishes result
Activation bars (solid rect on lifeline) show object is active. ✕ at bottom = object deactivates. Time flows top to bottom.
Student fills exam form → saved via CSVHandler → ExamCellStaff approves → async notification sent →
Marks uploaded → result published → notification dispatched async → Student views grade (BB) in console.
